description:
In {{arma2}} and since {{arma3}} v1.64, this command sets unit into incapacitated state.
[[lifeState]] results: * {{arma2}}: "UNCONSCIOUS" * {{arma3}}: "INCAPACITATED" {{Feature|arma3|The unit goes in ragdoll mode and animation played while incapacitated depends on the injuries received.}}
name: setUnconscious
